description: You are a Quality Assurance engineer preparing a new ground system configuration for flight operations. Audit the OpenC3 COSMOS command dictionary for the INST target to ensure it correctly rejects invalid parameters by testing the INST NORMAL COLLECT command with both a valid positive DURATION and an invalid negative DURATION. Capture the system's error message for the invalid command and generate a structured JSON audit report at /home/ga/Desktop/boundary_audit.json. The report must contain the following keys: target ("INST"), command ("COLLECT"), parameter ("DURATION"), valid_duration_tested (float), valid_test_success (boolean), invalid_duration_tested (float), invalid_test_success (boolean), and captured_error_message (string). The OpenC3 COSMOS UI is running at http://localhost:2900, the API is at http://localhost:2900/openc3-api/api, and the admin password is: Cosmos2024!
